root_cause_finding: CF Pages git-integration deployment (project=autonomath, deploy_id=b569ff21-2915-449b-b61d-c44fab03d66e, commit=18abbb0a) contains 10,161 files: 9,632 .html but only 7 .md files (the 7 are press/security only). The 10,257 companion .md files under site/cases, site/laws, site/enforcement are present in the git tree but NOT in the deployed manifest. Sitemap is correctly aligned with the on-disk 10,264-file inventory (verified via /v1/audit/sitemap endpoint). Cache purge attempted via /accounts/{id}/pages/projects/autonomath/purge_build_cache and returned success=True, but the cache is not the cause - the files are absent from the upstream deployment. Fix path: switch chunked .md directories from CF Pages git-integration auto-deploy to wrangler-direct-upload, or add `_redirects` rule mapping {url}.md -> /v1/companion/{url}.md proxy on api.jpcite.com.

cache_purge_attempt.note: Returned success but cannot fix absent files - purge only clears edge cache, not the deployment manifest.
